title: Special Education: Students in Nondistrict Placement
description: When a student with disabilities is placed in a school or program outside of Conroe ISD — such as a private school, residential facility, or other specialized setting — this policy outlines how the district handles its responsibilities for that student's education. It clarifies what services the district provides, how decisions about placement are made, and how families can stay informed and involved throughout the process. Parents of students in outside placements can look to this policy to understand their rights and what they can expect from the district.
